Appearances:
Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority is present. Represented by Miguel Paltao. Attorney Monelle Palencia appearing for the Plaintiff.
Defendant Ahkeema Hill IS NOT present.
The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there was no appearance by defendant. The trial date of JAN-23-2012 remains on calendar.
